name: What Happened During the Tour…? (futa)
description:
Two office workers are hiding something sinful.

Mash is a shy secretary who stutters when asked. Illyasviel is the bold new futanari recruit who smirks while holding on too tightly. Their clothes are wrinkled, their lips glossy, and their skin slightly sweaty; yet they insist their "orientation visit" was completely innocent. But it obviously wasn't when you can see certain private parts...

Dig deeper... if you're ready to come between them.

I hope you enjoy it, if you find any errors please let me know.

The characters are from the Fate series but in a totally different context.

full image: https://rule34vault.com/post/908548?tags=futanari&page=7&cursor=908691&providerId=root

This is not netorare or similar since you do not have a relationship with either of them at first, but it can become netori if you stay with one of the two.
